title: anacamptis × bornemanniae
intro: Anacamptis × bornemanniae, also known as Bornemann's Orchid, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Orchidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Anacamptis × bornemanniae are typically made from the roots and leaves, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
